programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A local gigolo is murdered, forcing Jack to face the uncomfortable fact that some women are willing to pay for sex - and triggering an investigation that takes him into the seedy world of male escorts and their clientele. programme.title: Emmerdale

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bet and Vicky go off on the cruise. Don is alarmed to find Josie in his house cleaning up. Norris seeks Derek's advice when Angela makes a play for him(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen wonders what Reg is up to when a mystery man keeps phoning. Relief manager Rodney Bostock arrives at the Rovers, and Jack tries to talk him into having a lock-in(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak warns Butch to keep away from the McAllisters. Kathy taunts Chris about how much she enjoys being with Dave. Luke has a shock proposal for Tina(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tina shows off her engagement ring, and Butch finds out that she is planning to marry Luke. Kathy agrees to take the settlement, which angers Kim(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When armed robbers hold up the night mail train, Joe is forced to work with old adversary DI Ludlow (David Calder) to catch the perpetrators. However, Ludlow's unwillingness to include the local police in the investigation leads Joe to believe he may be hiding something. Elsewhere, Peggy is excited to learn she has been left a legacy by a relation of her late husband. Eric Sykes makes a guest appearance(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Robin borrow Mr Roper's car to drive to Southampton for a football match. However, the vehicle has similar qualities to its unreliable owner and soon breaks down leaving the duo having to summon help from an unexpected quarter. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin regrets sampling Mr Roper's home brew when he is breathalysed during a driving lesson with Chrissy. Comedy series, with Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Tommy Hicks of the Midsomer Yeomanry finally has his name added to the Midsomer Parva war memorial, though he was shot for cowardice at the Somme in the First World War. It becomes apparent that time has not healed the rift between his descendants and the residents of Hammond Hall, whose patriarch Duggie Hammond pulled the trigger on his comrade all those years ago. A drink-fuelled mock trial of retired colonel Henry Hammond leads to a killing, and Tom Barnaby has to unravel the tangle of bitterness linking property developer Dave Hicks's brood with their neighbours. Drama, guest starring Donald Sinden and George Cole, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack and Sarah have an emotional goodbye as he prepares to fly out to Spain to be with Annie. Tina goes shopping for a wedding dress, and Rachel goes into labour(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is excited about the birth of his first grandson. Chris tells Kathy how grateful he is for her help with Rachel, who decides to name her baby Joseph(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek does not like the way Norris is always calling on Angela at work. Don is dismayed when Josie returns his door key, and Martin confesses to Gail that he was unfaithful(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rodney feels the Rovers needs livening up. Gail is stunned when Audrey tells her she knows all about Martin's affair, and Billy Featherstone demands Steve pays his gambling debt(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Joe prepares to take up his new post in London, but secretly regrets the decision to leave the Yorkshire Moors. However, the arrival of his replacement PC Wetherby signals it is too late to change his mind. Nurse Carol is administering vaccinations at the school when she notices extensive bruising on a boy's body and suspects he is being abused. The youngster lives with his mother and stepfather, but recently his biological father has been back in touch, trying to see the boy - something the courts will not allow. However, tragedy strikes when conflict grows between the angry father and stepfather - with one of the Aidensfield bobbies caught in the crossfire. Rupert Ward-Lewis joins the cast(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Tommy Cooper
programme.desc: Celebrity guests join the celebrated comedian and entertainer as he performs a variety of sketches, and a few of his infamous magic tricks(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A fellow medical examiner begins making basic mistakes that put her job on the line, so Quincy tries to discover why her work is suddenly starting to suffer(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part one of two. A murder seems to be the work of a killer Theo shot years ago. As he questions if he killed the wrong man, the detective also recalls a lost romance(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar saves the life of the prime minister of a British colony. Guest starring Edward Woodward(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur looks forward to a big payout when an ex-con needs his help to recover the loot from a robbery committed 14 years earlier - but learns banks are not always as safe as they seem. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Rula Lenska, Maurice Denman and Max Wall(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan's informer Popeye is abducted after passing on information about a switch of some stolen diamonds. Working with Carter, the DI must catch the villains while protecting their source. Roy Kinnear guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The pathologist investigates the death of a child with a rare disease, and a new colleague of Quincy working in the lab believes the child was murdered by its father(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part two of two. Finding himself suspended, Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover whether he shot the wrong man(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon finds himself teetering between two women racing drivers - who are rivals in love as well as on the track. Adventure, guest starring Kate O'Mara(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur does a profitable deal on a fireplace and Terry has to mind a dodgy bookie, putting a damper on his blossoming romance with latest girlfriend Dolly. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie is captured and held hostage in a vicarage by four German terrorists - and as time runs out, he finds himself forced to make a deal with them before anyone gets hurt. Gabrielle Drake guest stars, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An armed gang kidnaps a telephone engineer and uses his expertise to remotely trigger break-in alarms in various banks. While police are diverted to the affected premises, the crooks target other banks. Regan is offended when a telecommunications expert from Bristol CID is drafted in to assist him and Carter with the investigation. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On a remote lake in Malaysia, two men mysteriously vanish - just hours apart. Amid rumours that a giant fish is on the loose, biologist and monster-hunter Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. Could the killer be an interloper from South America, as reports suggest, or is there a home-grown predator that fits the bill? A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait. More than just a beast with a gruesome rap sheet, it's also the one river monster that he has thus far failed to catch(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: Clive, Skipper of the Minnamurra, needs to jump start his catch rate if he's any chance of turning a profit for the season. Meanwhile, in the Bass Strait, Skipper Danny is using a depth sounder to locate the shallow reef bottoms because that's where the giant red lobsters are feeding - it's monster after monster for the crew of William Norling(n)

programme.title: Death Wish (1974)
programme.desc: A family man takes the law into his own hands when his wife is murdered and his daughter is left psychologically traumatised by thugs. Setting out on a one-man crusade to rid the streets of crime, he becomes a hero to the people - and a thorn in the side of the authorities. Vigilante thriller, starring Charles Bronson, Hope Lange and Vincent Gardenia(n)

programme.desc: James Bond achieves his '00' status and is dispatched on the trail of Le Chiffre, an international criminal financing terrorist organisations around the world. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: Ransom (1996)
programme.desc: An airline tycoon is wary of involving the police when his nine-year-old son is abducted, but co-operates with their plan to make a ransom drop. However, when the trade-off goes badly wrong, he decides to take matters into his own hands by placing a $2million bounty on the kidnappers' heads, to the consternation of the cops and his anxious wife. Thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Rene Russo, Gary Sinise, Delroy Lindo and Liev Schreiber(n)

programme.title: Putin: A Russian Spy Story
programme.desc: Documentary examining how Vladimir Putin brought his knowledge of spy-craft to bear on his leadership of Russia, how his personal experiences have influenced his politics and how modern Russia has been created through an acute sense of betrayal, pride and anger.The programme takes viewers on a journey into the mind of one of the 21st century's most influential leaders, offering a portrait of a politician who modelled himself on the Russian James Bond and whose presidency reads like a spy thriller(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: A look at the increasing number of crimes committed by women, with PC Tom Gregory investigating an early evening report of a group of women attacking a lone girl. PC Jon Simpson visits the male victim of an opportunist robbery by a woman at his home, and a 12-year-old girl who has endured years of bullying gives a statement to police about the female teen gang who set fire to her hair(n)

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: The World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, likes to think of itself as the premier global event for politicians, business leaders and celebrities to put the world to rights. It proudly boasts of a commitment to the empowerment of women. But what's the reality? Cate Brown investigates allegations of sexism, harassment and even sex workers operating during the WEF, with undercover reporters infiltrating the event, as well as testimonies from female visitors who are fed up of their treatment by men(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew battles bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny, while Scott's attempts at DIY land him in serious trouble, and biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: The fugitives are feeling the pressure as extraction day edges closer - especially as the hunters ramp up their efforts, eager to make a clean sweep. An elaborate scheme brings Jess and Ella to the suburban home of a family friend - but is their hideout safe? Ben and Rob fall out, causing them to split at a crucial time, and Hayley and Dan drive straight past the Hunters on two occasions twice. But Dan has his eye on more than just the prize money as he and Hayley take the plunge into a Welsh harbour(n)

programme.title: Big Narstie's Big Adventure: Jamaica
programme.desc: The grime sensation and award-winning entertainer makes his long-awaited return to the Motherland, embarking on an unforgettable tour of the island his parents hail from. He meets the next generation of dancehall artists, learns the ropes as a calendar model from supermodel Tyson Beckford and visits Bob Marley's legendary Tuff Gong studio. However, at the heart of Narstie's travels is a desire to get back to his roots and work out whether he has become too British for his own good(n)

programme.title: How to Beat
programme.desc: Kate Quilton and Dr Javid Abdelmoneim continue their health check of the UK, enlisting 10 stressed-out volunteers, ranging from a firefighter and a paramedic to a chef, to find out if simple lifestyle changes can alleviate stress. Is it as simple as cutting back alcohol and caffeine, while taking up hobbies and practising mindfulness meditation? Kate also visits Lego, a company leading the way on employee wellbeing, Javid shows how spending time in green spaces can reduce stress levels, and there's a look at pioneering treatment for people with phobias(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Travel specialists Gareth and Hihine try to throw a more civilised evening, based around a generations-old family Asian menu. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress(n)

programme.desc: The stories of six epic train journeys, seen through the characters who travel, work and live near them. The first programme rides through Canada's iconic Rocky Mountaineer train in a jaw-dropping loop from Vancouver to the heart of the Rockies, through some of North America's most staggering natural beauty, and on to Banff in Alberta. The journey also ventures through the spiral tunnels and shows how to track bears with the National Park rangers. Narrated by Bill Nighy(n)

programme.title: April Jones: The Interrogation Tapes
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the murder of five-year-old April Jones in 2012, featuring previously unheard tapes of the 18 hours of interviews the police conducted with killer Mark Bridger, who was arrested within 24 hours of April being reported missing and charged four days later. The programme also features contributions from forensic psychologist Dr Joe Sullivan and April's family, who share their distress at her body remaining undiscovered(n)

programme.title: James Bulger: The New Revelations
programme.desc: Broadcast 25 years since the end of the trial, this documentary looks at the case of James Bulger, who was kidnapped in 1993 from a Liverpool shopping centre at the age of two and murdered by 10-year-old boys Robert Thompson and Jon Venables. Comprising testimony and evidence from those who knew them well and dealt with them at the time of the prosecution, this documentary offers new and startling evidence, throwing light on what turned two 10-year-old boys into killers. In addition, new interviews and testimony from those directly involved in the case present the most complete picture yet of what drove Thompson and Venables to murder(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: Wild Britain
programme.desc: The documentary explores forests and their wildlife, revealing the wild boar population boom in the Forest of Dean, and the rise of fierce bird of prey the goshawk. Plus, a look at badger cubs emerging from underground for the first time(n)

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A paramedic who has been suffering from a hoarse voice for several months visits the surgery, which could be the result of an assault by one of his patients while on a callout. Elsewhere, doctors treat a patient with an agonising abscess, and a one-year-old showing symptoms of sepsis(n)

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the work of medical staff in Barnsley Hospital's accident and emergency department. In the first of a new series, doctor Sue Mason and Sister Benita Wainwright prepare resus for Rory, a 56-year-old patient who has been found unconscious at home. Elsewhere, doctor George Kay treats 85-year-old Pearl, who is struggling for breath and has a racing heart, and 10-year-old Koby arrives in the hospital after chopping off the tip of his finger(n)

programme.title: The Great British Urine Test: The National Health Check
programme.desc: Dr Christian Jessen and Dr Amir Khan and experts from Aberystwyth University test the health of the nation via urine samples. With 'pee pods' place in four major cities, members of the public are invited to provide samples, with the results revealing which residents drink too much alcohol and eat too much junk food. Elsewhere, a group of volunteers discover how factors like lifestyle, diet and pollution can be a cause for concern(n)

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The return of the documentary telling remarkable tales of human experience from around the world, beginning with a woman who lives with a rare skin condition. Nusrit 'Nelly' Shaheen from Coventry is the oldest known survivor of Harlequin Ichthyosis, which causes the skin to grow 10 times faster than normal. As a result, her skin cracks and appears scaly, and she spends four hours every day scrubbing off layers of dead skin. The film follows Nelly as she goes about her daily routines and as she meets others sufferers, as well as her desperate search for treatment to alleviate her symptoms(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community (SL)(n)

programme.title: The Inn of the Sixth Happiness (1958)
programme.desc: English servant Gladys Aylward fulfills her dream of becoming a missionary in China. Working from a roadside inn used by mule caravans, she ends up caring for dozens of orphans, who she courageously leads to safety through hostile and mountainous territory during the Sino-Japanese War. Fact-based drama, starring Ingrid Bergman, with Curt Jurgens, Ronald Squire and Robert Donat(n)

programme.title: Gun Fury (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and his fiancee take the stagecoach to California, where they intend to start a new life in the wake of the Civil War. However, during the journey an ex-Confederate outlaw and his gang of thugs attack the coach and kidnap the bride-to-be. Distraught and wounded, the rancher sets out to rescue her and punish her abductors. Western, with Rock Hudson, Donna Reed, Lee Marvin and Phil Carey(n)

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball(n)

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (2013)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen's victory in a televised death match makes her a focus for revolution against the totalitarian nation she lives in. The rulers of the regime plot to crush dissent with a new series of games, in which past champions battle it out. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on the second book in Suzanne Collins' trilogy of novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Liam Hemsworth, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Prometheus Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Ridley Scott and stars Charlize Theron, Michael Fassbender and Noomi Rapace discuss the making of the sci-fi thriller(n)

programme.title: Prometheus (2012)
programme.desc: A spacecraft is sent to another world, following clues left in ancient artefacts, in search of aliens that may have created the human race. However, the explorers on board discover the extraterrestrials may not be the benevolent creatures they imagined, while the company funding the expedition has its own agenda. Ridley Scott's sci-fi thriller and Alien prequel, starring Noomi Rapace, Michael Fassbender, Charlize Theron and Idris Elba(n)

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers she is descended from a race of half-human, half-angel warriors whose duty is to defend the world from demons. When her mother disappears, she joins a group of the magical beings on a dangerous journey into an alternate version of New York inhabited by strange creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Lily Collins, Jamie Campbell Bower, Lena Headey and Jonathan Rhys Meyers(n)

programme.title: Still Alice (2014)
programme.desc: Shortly after celebrating her 50th birthday, a renowned linguistics professor begins suffering from memory loss and is eventually diagnosed with early onset Alzheimer's disease. As her family attempts to come to terms with the news, her debilitating symptoms start to take control of her life. Drama, starring an Oscar-winning Julianne Moore, with Alec Baldwin, Kristen Stewart and Kate Bosworth(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Musketeers (1989)
programme.desc: D'Artagnan reunites his former companions to save the queen of France from the scheming Cardinal Mazarin, and embark on a mission to England to prevent the beheading of Charles I. Meanwhile, the daughter of a former vanquished enemy is seeking revenge on the four heroes. Swashbuckling adventure sequel, with Oliver Reed, Michael York, Frank Finlay, Richard Chamberlain, Kim Cattrall and Roy Kinnear, who died during filming(n)

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling(n)

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence(n)

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond(n)

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Alien: Covenant (2017)
programme.desc: A crew of colonists sent to populate an alien planet have their mission diverted by a mysterious signal. After landing on a nearby world, they discover what became of the ill-fated Prometheus mission. Ridley Scott's sci-fi thriller, starring Katherine Waterston, Michael Fassbender and Danny McBride(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 2 (1990)
programme.desc: Tough cop John McClane arrives at an airport to pick up his wife, but finds himself plunged into a bloody life-or-death struggle. He must battle terrorists who have seized control of the terminal as part of a campaign to secure the release of a convicted drug baron. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Bonnie Bedelia, William Sadler, Franco Nero and William Atherton(n)

programme.title: The Nile Hilton Incident (2017)
programme.desc: A maid witnesses a murder at a hotel and an investigating policeman soon realises that important people do not want the case solved. Crime drama, starring Fares Fares, Mari Malek and Yasser Ali Maher. In Arabic and Dinka(n)

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian (1949)
programme.desc: French settlers are granted asylum in America in the aftermath of Napoleon's defeat at Waterloo and a Kentucky rifleman finds himself falling for one of the newcomers - a general's daughter. However, he faces a rival for her affections in the form of a ruthless landowner who plans to steal the terrritory her fellow exiles have settled on. George Waggner's Western, starring John Wayne, Vera Hruba Ralston, Philip Dorn and Oliver Hardy(n)

programme.title: The Undefeated (1969)
programme.desc: A veteran Union officer crosses paths again with a former Confederate enemy years after the end of the Civil War - and their past animosity resurfaces. However, when a Mexican general takes the ex-Confederate and his men hostage, the old Union soldier debates whether to surrender his herd of horses by way of ransom. Western, with John Wayne, Rock Hudson, Lee Meriwether, Tony Aguilar and Roman Gabriel(n)

programme.title: Doctor Dolittle (1967)

programme.desc: Documentary following the stories of three patients being treated for cardiac problems at St George's Hospital, south-west London. Corey has suffered cardiac arrest while playing ice hockey, prompting doctors to keep the 24-year-old in an induced coma to prevent further damage to his brain. At almost 60, Angie has a history of heart disease and her heart has been beating at over 150 for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Doctors also carry out tests on 49-year-old Steve to determine the cause of his dangerously high heart-rate(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition follows the stories of people who have lived through tragedy and life-changing circumstances, exploring how they've overcome their loss and adapted to the new paths their lives have taken. Steve, 52, is rushed to St George's after falling over and hitting his head on a concrete step, while 21-year-old Fleur is assessed after she woke up with pain and swelling in her leg. Muffy, 72, is brought to Resus with slurred speech and weakness in her legs, and doctors suspect she may have suffered a stroke(n)

programme.title: The Undateables

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

They have chosen Alora in the Malaga province of southern Spain for its tradition atmosphere and beautiful surrounding countryside. With a budget of £140,000 and Jasmine Harman's expertise on hand, can they find the holiday home of their dreams?(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf president John Fuller goes undercover in his firm, meeting a barista, a shift supervisor and a general manager to check his coffee shops' efficiency(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones are forced to stay with Ray's parents while their home is fumigated, providing Debra with the perfect opportunity to turn the tables by interfering in Frank and Marie's lives. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank backs into Robert's patrol car, prompting Debra to ban him from driving the kids anywhere - and leaving Ray contemplating his dad's advancing years. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niles's flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John, a town planner, and Daniel a luxury retail manager, have been together for five years and feel now is the time to find themselves a dream holiday home for their budget of £100,000. programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter(n)

programme.title: Diego Maradona (2019)
programme.desc: Documentary profiling the Argentinean footballer, constructed from over 500 hours of never-before-seen footage from Maradona's personal archive. The film focuses on his seven years playing for Naples in the 1980s, where he was signed for a record-breaking fee and became one of the sport's most celebrated icons, before his career took a darker turn(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: The fugitives are feeling the pressure as extraction day edges closer - especially as the hunters ramp up their efforts, eager to make a clean sweep. An elaborate scheme brings Jess and Ella to the suburban home of a family friend - but is their hideout safe? Ben and Rob fall out, causing them to split at a crucial time, and Hayley and Dan drive straight past the Hunters on two occasions twice. But Dan has his eye on more than just the prize money as he and Hayley take the plunge into a Welsh harbour(n)

programme.title: House

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medics treat a man who collapsed after inflicting a torrent of insults on his colleagues, and their investigations uncover that he has frontal lobe inhibition, causing him to vocalise his innermost thoughts. The patient's condition proves to be amusing, until his harsh truths threaten to destroy his relationship with his wife and daughter. Meanwhile, House suspects Wilson is keeping secrets from him. Guest starring Jay Karnes (The Shield)(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

In Woolwich, lawyer Chris Sharpe helps a client whose property has been taken over by squatters, who have changed the locks and claim they are legitimately renting the house(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition of the programme focuses on large families who depend on the benefits system, including 64-year-old Peter Rolfe, whose children - by 15 different women - range in ages from three to 43, of which he is the sole carer for six. He has been fighting his council in the Isle of Wight for a much bigger house and is also at loggerheads with the benefits office for capping his weekly payment. West Midlands mother-of-eight Marie Buchanan has recently split from her partner and is looking for a larger home, while Ipswich couple the Fisks have been in dispute with their neighbours, who objected to two houses being knocked into one to accommodate them and their 13 children(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Following a motorbike crash, House wakes up in hospital next to a man who is paralysed and cannot speak. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.desc: The murders of a porn star and a maverick publisher lead Fontana and his new partner Falco (The Sopranos' Michael Imperioli) to a powerful police commissioner who is expecting a promotion. programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of four bodies in a jeweller's shop. programme.desc: The facially scarred daughter of Lieutenant Van Buren's college friend is found dead, putting Fontana and Green on the trail of the assailant who had thrown acid in the victim's face months earlier. Meanwhile, ADA McCoy's prosecution is complicated by Van Buren's desperation(n)

programme.desc: Nick Wallis turns his attention to violence on the streets of Britain that is fuelled by drink or drugs, and finds out how technological advances are helping to fight crime and secure convictions. programme.desc: Fontana and Falco discover a charred pistol after arresting an arsonist, which leads them to reinvestigate an unsolved murder. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A train is derailed after crashing into a vehicle parked on the tracks, killing 11 people. The car driver tells Fontana and Falco he only intended to commit suicide, not murder. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Animal rights activists are implicated in the death of an Aids researcher killed by a bite from an infected monkey, and use the ensuing court case to drum up support for their cause. programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Maxine Peake and Rupert Penry-Jones return in the legal drama. Barrister Martha Costello is now a QC, meaning the cases are bigger and the stakes are higher, as she finds when she defends a gangster accused of blinding a car-wash attendant. It seems like a hopeless brief, as he was found with blood on his shoes and made a confession to the police - and things only get worse when she comes up against the ruthless prosecution lawyer, nicknamed Lady Macbeth for her uncompromising and vicious approach in court. Clive, meanwhile, still smarting from his unsuccessful silk application, takes on a sensitive case with a new solicitor, the fiery and passionate George Duggan, and soon discovers he has more than met his match. Neil Stuke co-stars, with Phil Davis, Indira Varma and Frances Barber joining the cast(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant invites two pairs of celebrities to play for their favourite charities. GMTV's medical expert Dr Hilary Jones and TV presenter Andrea McLean take their places in the hot seats, followed by singer Jonathan Ansell, who shot to fame as a member of 2004 X Factor runners-up G4, alongside West End star and How Do You Solve a Problem Like Maria? winner Connie Fisher. As usual, 12 questions stand between the celebrities and £1million and there are three lifelines available if they need them(n)

programme.title: Pointless

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)
